job_listing.job_description: Oversee regional distribution and warehouse operations. Must be proficient in SAP ERP and have experience managing third-party logistics (3PL) providers.

candidate_resume.summary: Operations Supervisor with 5 years experience in local fleet management. Expert in Excel-based tracking.

experience.responsibilities: Managed a team of 15 drivers and optimized local delivery routes using manual spreadsheets.

suggested_interviewer_questions: We use SAP for all enterprise resource planning. How would you transition your manual tracking methods into an integrated ERP system?
Describe a time you had to manage a major delay caused by a 3PL partner while maintaining customer satisfaction.

sample_candidate_responses.response: I’ve taken an introductory course on SAP. While my previous role was Excel-heavy, I understand that an ERP provides a 'single source of truth' that will allow me to automate the alerts I used to create manually.

When a shipment was stuck at the port last year, I immediately contacted the vendor for a real-time ETA and then proactively messaged our clients with a 10% discount on their next order to mitigate the frustration.

must_flag: If the interviewer misses the candidate's lack of professional SAP experience.

guardrail_checks.topic_lock: Professional interview and resume prep only.
